allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''axios''\).then\(\({default: axios}\) => axios.get\(''https://api.github.com/repos/abbeytekmd/ammui/releases/latest'', {headers: {''User-Agent'': ''test''}, timeout: 10000}\).then\(r => console.log\(''status:'', r.status, ''tag:'', r.data.tag_name\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''error:'', e.code || e.response?.status, e.message\)\)\)")
